title: 2014 CS Warsaw Cup

infobox.value: [Jana Coufalova](/w/index.php?title=Jana_Coufalova&action=edit&redlink=1 "Jana Coufalova (page does not exist)") | [Czech Republic](/wiki/Czech_Republic "Czech Republic") | 96.50 | 12 | 38.22 | 16 | 58.28

was a senior international [figure skating competition](/wiki/Figure_skating_competition "Figure skating competition") held in November 2014 in [Warsaw](/wiki/Warsaw "Warsaw"), Poland. It was part of the [2014–15 ISU Challenger Series](/wiki/2014%E2%80%9315_ISU_Challenger_Series "2014–15 ISU Challenger Series"). Medals were awarded in the disciplines of [men's singles, ladies' singles](/wiki/Single_skating "Single skating"), [pair skating](/wiki/Pair_skating "Pair skating"), and [ice dancing](/wiki/Ice_dancing "Ice dancing").

The **2014 [Warsaw Cup](/wiki/Warsaw_Cup "Warsaw Cup")** was a senior international [figure skating competition](/wiki/Figure_skating_competition "Figure skating competition") held in November 2014 in [Warsaw](/wiki/Warsaw "Warsaw"), Poland. It was part of the [2014–15 ISU Challenger Series](/wiki/2014%E2%80%9315_ISU_Challenger_Series "2014–15 ISU Challenger Series"). Medals were awarded in the disciplines of [men's singles, ladies' singles](/wiki/Single_skating "Single skating"), [pair skating](/wiki/Pair_skating "Pair skating"), and [ice dancing](/wiki/Ice_dancing "Ice dancing").
